title: SVNIT Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Project Engineer Posts
description: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat (SVNIT) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 02 Project Engineer Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in M.E/ M.Tech, M.Sc can use this chance and apply for these posts.  Here, we provided more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for the SVNIT Notification 2026 .
